case_title: ERNE, DOROTHY VS AMC,INC DBA AMC 1000VAN NESS THEATRE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ERNE, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT AMC,INC DBA AMC 1000VAN NESS THEATRE THE CHRONICLE PUBLISHING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
